---
title: "B1.4 –– Introduction to Linguistics"
format:
  html:
    include-before-body: helpers/remove-nav.html
    include-after-body: helpers/remove-title.html
---

<!-- # 📑 Course Brief -->

This course will give you a brief tour of linguistics.

You will learn how language is a window to the mind.
We will discuss evolution of language, animal and human communication, and learn about sounds of language, grammar, how meanings are formed and represented in the mind among many other things. \
As speech pathology and audiology undergrads, you will learn to connect these ideas from linguistics to the disorders of speech, language, and hearing. 

You will read textbooks as well as scientific papers from academic journals assigned before and after each lecture.

-----------------

**Select Academic Year/Term:**

<a href="2083/index.qmd">
    <button class="button-61">2083</button>
</a>
